testcase.name: test_webhook_endpoint_responsive

failure.message: AssertionError: Webhook endpoint returned 520 assert 520 == 200 + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_p0_bug_fixes.py:59: in test_webhook_endpoint_responsive assert response.status_code == 200, f"Webhook endpoint returned {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Webhook endpoint returned 520 E assert 520 == 200 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_status_update_after_sweep_result
test_transaction_finished_all_paths

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected at least 4 transactionFinished = true, found 3 assert 3 >= 4

testcase.failure: tests/test_p0_bug_fixes.py:381: in test_transaction_finished_all_paths assert finished_true_count >= expected_min, \ E AssertionError: Expected at least 4 transactionFinished = true, found 3 E assert 3 >= 4
